name: Ly Thuong Kiet
overview: In 1072, King Ly Thanh Tong died, 7 years old Crown Prince Can Duc ascended the throne, alias Ly Nhan Tong. At the same time in the north, the Song dynasty was disturbed by the reforms of Vuong An Thach, and the Song Dynasty plotted to attack the South.

trailers.title: Teaser - Lý Thường Kiệt đại chiến Ung Châu thành - Phần 2 | Việt Sử Kiêu Hùng
